audit_items.proof_trace: RM_SetDisconnectCallback contains no free() calls — the UAF assertion is vacuously satisfied within the function itself. The bc pointer it receives cannot be dangling: bc is freed only in moduleHandleBlockedClients() (line 3702) via beforeSleep(), which runs between event loop iterations; RM_SetDisconnectCallback is called synchronously in the command handler on the same main thread, so moduleHandleBlockedClients() cannot execute until after the handler returns and bc is no longer referenced.
